    Asserts that the given callable throws an exception.

    ThrowableCheck
    ThrowableCheck.isExactlyInstanceOf(Class<? extends Throwable> type)
     
    ThrowableCheck
    ThrowableCheck.rootCause()
    Extracts the root cause (deepest in the chain) for further assertions.
    ThrowableCheck
    ThrowableCheck.suppressedException(int index)
    Extracts a suppressed exception by index for further assertions.
    ThrowableCheck
    ExecutionCheck.throwsA(Class<? extends Throwable> expectedType)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Use ExecutionCheck.throwsInstanceOf(Class) instead.
    ThrowableCheck
    ExecutionCheck.throwsExactly(Class<? extends Throwable> expectedType)
    Asserts that the code block throws an exception whose class is exactly the given type (not a subclass).
    ThrowableCheck
    ExecutionCheck.throwsInstanceOf(Class<? extends Throwable> expectedType)
    Asserts that the code block throws an exception that is an instance of the given type (including subclasses).
